unique_vulnerabilities.name: Weak PRNG in random()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: The weak-prng finding highlights the use of an insecure random number generator in the random() function.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Dead code in random()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: The dead-code finding indicates that the random() function is unused and should be removed. This is unrelated to the weak PRNG issue.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both solc-version findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version (0.4.25) and its associated risks. These are logically the same issue.
